content: I’m curious are the paid banners this anni exclusive or a (semi) frequent occurrences?
They seem to be now, yeah
Though format may vary
It was per realm for two runs
instead of the current themed setup
I would argue they (especially the astral realm guarantee) are the best value in the game to go for.
The value definitely goes down as your roster expands though
Sure for the realm specific ones
All of them, really
You get enough rolls for a copy of pretty much any awakener you want + monthly dupes
so by next half anniv you probably won't touch the paid banner either
(better to pay for packs with more rolls/dupes to focus down the awakeners you like instead of drawing from random pools)
Great to start with though. I bought three when I first started because game made me happy lol
what makes the realm specific ones different from role specific?
Because the realm specific only give faded legacy
I mean, that's always subject to change lol
If it was astral reign some units benefit well from dupes, and you get more on wheels.
Even if character value becomes less over time, more wheel dupes I think are still pretty good.
it depends on the banner
it truly depends lol
Sure
Caro banner value would go down
I’m just saying by inherent value per price
Is still better than most packages in the game
Well, that's a different point that I agree with

youd probably already have the dupes you need for characters that youve already pulled

can someone explain rouse to me?
Pretty simple enough.
You get str whenever you make goliath do any damage
And you also get +2 tentacle damage
You know about tentacle mechanic in aequor?
Rouse unlocks a new part of the character's kit when played
Oh just rouse.
It’s permanent for the battle
It resets between waves
what is the awakeners permanent though? what does that mean
i know how rouse works i dont know what it does
So from reading this, if I have enough corrosion, using gdoll’s finale removes 30%+90% of a target’s hp?

"Awakener" is the character in question
"Permanent" is a bit misleading but the effect persists until the end of the battle

Kind of no, the HP loss you get from corrosion is dependent on the corrosion stacks

If for some reason you had Corrosion stacks equal to 30% of the boss's Max HP, then yes it would basically oneshot
But if you only have let's say, 1000 Corrosion, no matter how much damage you deal, it'll only remove 3000 HP
Ye so I can basically stack up an amount equal to 22%hp or higher and would suffice for the hp cut.
mhm, basically Corrosion stacks equal to 23.3% of Max HP though most bosses in the later parts of the game won't really let you stack that much (due to HP inflation...)
or multiple phases
Lower wave a5 at least. Though depending on boss by turn 5 skipping 1 bar is good enough for turn 6 burst.
Finale’s damage and corrosion is fixed so there’s no need to allocate any damage boost or anything.

fwiw, i have not seen corrosion stacks get past 25K, though I'd guess people can get up to double that if they minmaxed stuff, but... DTide bosses have been slowly increasing in HP over time and currently i don't think you can do that for wave 1...? I've forgotten how much hp it exactly had but it would be funny to see
I've done it before
i didnt think that corrosion is based on max hp though?
but yeah it's not really viable for a5
is it?
i did it in a4 to finish off a boss once and it was funny
no, corrosion is based off of castor's attack stat
and his personal damage amp stat
we mean like you'd need corrosion stacks equal to 23.3% of the BOSS max hp to one shot it with gdoll end of illusion
actually damage amp might only be the damage increase he gets per corrosion, i think the actual value is still flat atk based
What’s the average hp for a5 I thought it was around 200k.
ohhh
haha
oh goodness
wouldn't that be wonderful
thats funny
lol
it is possible to stack corrosion up really high with OE and the right build but at that point you're probably doing it for his own personal damage and not to proc
since you get a lot more value spacing corrosion out if you're proccing it
(wouldn't the boss also die by that point)
but i can't check in game right now
The other strategy is this but not with clem
And won’t cut the second hp but I wonder by how much
The 9 turn was too long I got 12 plumes by turn 5

Plumes are 840% atk for first one each turn
Soulforge can add another 360% atk to that

280% atk on every plume from his rouse
140% atk on every plume from his OE

so steeply diminishing returns from throwing them all out in one turn versus spacing them out
(again, assuming your goal is to proc and not boost his personal damage by applying Corrosion)

can someone explain how the corpo aurita discard team works, and what aftershock does
Aftershock are cards that have special effect when discarded (specifically discarded) from your hand
Self explanatory
so discard team works by stacking the aftershock effects? and aurita and corpo put those 0 cost cards into discard that arecycled back into play? just trying to understand the way this team is played

I primarly use corpo but the idea is to have quite a few pilots you will discard when you pop her exalt.
The discarded pilots directly boost your damage but you also pop exalt to make lightning retribution cheaper + more damage
Aurita also gets discard and aftershock effect making it a good team synergy
So does Cassiah
you just have a deck full of things that give buffs when you discard them and then you spam discards
its not that complicated

corpo has 2 main aftershock effects, pilots(which you get from playing her cards) which will scale your tentacle damage when discarded and lightning which will proc the prepare when discarded(so the cost goes down everytime you discard it instead of just at the end of turn).

Aurita glands give her aliemus when discarded, which lets her build her exalt much faster, so she can do more damage. A lot of her damage is tentacles hits from red stance+exalt spam, which Corpo buffs.

both of them have built in discard+redraw full hand(corpo exalt and aurita friendship). If using casiah, poof also works(but doesn't work on lightning because it's not an aftershock iirc)
generate pilots, discard hand to build dmg and reduce cost of lightning, do big red tentacle turns with aurita exalt and lightnings
sry for being lowk stupid then 😭 i was taking a lot of damage and wanted to know if i was playing wrong
do i want to hold onto the pilots?
ah
Yeah if you are dying then you have to use pilots
pilots have to be played to build shield, you discard them until you're out of discards then play them so you don't die(don't play them if you don't need)
You want to play the pilots to avoid bloating deck too much
its a simple team conceptually but actually playing still requires you to have good stance management and know when to sacrifice pilots to get shield to not die
Generally never allow pilots to bloat your deck
If you have them, either discard or play them
and similarly chill on playing Gland Divisions if Aurita isn't getting enough aliemus to exalt and nomonm them all
i mostly just discarded them but then my deck looks like this is that normal
if you keep too many then your hands will brick
very normal
like that rofl
I mean pilot and gland division are still better than strike and defense
so i wouldnt call it a brick
loool ok so i had like 22 gland division in my discard and i was like hm
but if you are getting too many then yea start consuming them
Yeah, but you don't want to put *too* many in your deck
Some players don't discard Pilots at all and just play them always
Personally, I keep a small amount cycling, maybe 3-5 tops
rest I'll play as long as there's incoming damage
if you're doing harder content you do kinda need to discard cause you're just not going to be doing enough dmg, but yeah for normal content you might not need to build tentacle dmg much
i never play pilots unless i need the shield this turn
scaling just too important
<@472148378721976330> Good news, Thais is rerunning lmfao.
if you exalt with aurita with 10 glands on red stance with corpo exalt temp tentacles+vuln, she'll clear out things really quickly even without scaling
until you get to tougher hard modes/arc 2 last bosses/higher alert dtide and such
not late game she doesnt
you also reach the point where you kill the boss faster by scaling
even if its not strictly needed to clear
less turns = less incoming bullshit to deal with = good
right going to depend a bit and you probably should scale if there's like 3-4 phases like some of the last chapter boss stuff
obviously if its a short fight where you can kill everything with 1 lightning retribution then you dont have to think
anyway it's an interesting team, not the strongest but it's pretty unique, if they add a good discard support it'll be better too
Corpo is the discard support xD

How do I unlock OE? Is that related to enlightenment
OE is unlocked at +4 (7 dupes of a character, or 8 copies in total)

it increases the aliemus cap to 200 and lets you do a special boosted exalt that costs 200 aliemus

only certain characters have good OE so you shouldn't worry about it for the most part
for most of them you end up doing normal exalt most of the time
even if you have OE

the ones that are really game changing are

lotan, aigis (free characters)
sanga (standard banner)
gdoll
and then there are some that you occasionally use like tawil, but are not really needed

what banner should I pull on as a beginner?
just started

its generally recommended to pull on blue (aequor) as a beginner with your silver cores. Save your luminous cores for limited characters you like (the most recent one, gmurphy, is very very strong and works in most blue teams)

If you like characters from other (non-blue) realms, you will be given items that let you turn characters you don't like into standard selectors which can be used on units of your choice. 

So if you get 3 faros and you don't like her playstyle very much, you can use an origin of time on her and get 3 standard selectors in her place
So technically you can pull on any realm. A lot of people just recommend aequor because its realm mechanic is very strong early on and its standard character pool is one of the best
